message: New email from twill: Big Ideas, Bigger Opportunities: Join ‘Threads’ Scaling AI + Explore Job Openings at the bottom of this email!

metadata.subject: Big Ideas, Bigger Opportunities: Join ‘Threads’ Scaling AI + Explore Job Openings at the bottom of this email!
metadata.preview: Bringing together builders, thinkers, and explorers to create ideas, tools, and connections that matter. Check out our new jobs board and YC Demo Day recap. Join us at our next event lu.ma/twill.  ‌ ‌
